narrative:
Carroll County has 17,609 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 34.3% of registrants.
